data.title: Analyst predicts Bitcoin's consolidation could lead to a breakthrough nearing $70K. Bulls eye on breaking resistance.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has recently seen a period of consolidation, with a key indicator suggesting a potential significant price movement in the near future. The cryptocurrency has been trading sideways, and there are indications that a breakout may be imminent. Analysts are closely watching to see if the bulls can push the price past the resistance level of $70,000. This level has proven to be a significant hurdle for Bitcoin in recent trading sessions. Traders and investors are eagerly anticipating whether this resistance will be overcome, potentially leading to a surge in the price of Bitcoin.

data.title: Vietnam Airlines orders 50 Boeing 737 MAX planes to expand short- and medium-haul network amid travel demand growth.
data.description: Vietnam Airlines, in alignment with its growth strategy, has become the first operator of Boeing's single-aisle aircraft, placing an order for versatile 737-8 jets. This move aims to bolster Vietnam's short- and medium-haul network in response to increasing travel demand. The announcement was made in Washington on Feb. 18, 2026, with Boeing [NYSE: BA] and Vietnam Airlines leading the deal. The order marks a significant milestone for Vietnam Airlines as they prepare to incorporate these innovative aircraft to enhance their fleet.

data.title: Ecopetrol to report Q4 and full-year 2025 results on March 4, 2026. An important date for investors.
data.description: Colombian company Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) will be revealing its financial and operating outcomes for Q4 of 2025 and the entire year on March 4, 2026 after the market closes. This announcement was made in Bogota, Colombia, on February 18, 2026. The data will provide insights into the company's performance during the period and will be released to the public on Thursday, March...

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum stable, XRP, Dogecoin drop amid US-Iran tensions. BTC at $66,540.09, ETH at $1,959.54, XRP at $1.41, Dogecoin at $0.09837. Cryptocurrency market showed losses and Bitcoin trading volume dipped, with millions liquidated. Bitcoin's open interest rose 1.31%, indicating strong bearish sentiment. Market gripped by "Extreme Fear" sentiment amid geopolitical concerns.
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies experienced losses on Wednesday as the Trump administration's potential military conflict with Iran caused uncertainty in the market. Bitcoin dropped by 0.93% to $66,540.09, Ethereum decreased by 0.85% to $1,959.54, XRP fell by 3.40% to $1.41, Solana declined by 3.23% to $81.68, and Dogecoin dropped by 2.33% to $0.09837. Bitcoin traded between $65,000s to $68,000s with lower volume, while Ethereum remained close to $2,000. Over the past 24 hours, $220 million was liquidated from the market, with a rise in Bitcoin's open interest by 1.31%. Cryptocurrency-related stocks like Strategy Inc. and BitMine Immersion Technologies Inc. closed down by 3.89% and 3.86% respectively. This resulted in long liquidations bearing the brunt of losses. The market sentiment was characterized by "Extreme Fear," indicating a bearish outlook.
Indonesia’s currency dips to 16,900 per dollar.

data.title: Genesis Energy, L.P. prices $750M in senior notes due 2034, upsized from $500M, at 6.75% interest rate.
data.description: In Houston today, Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) disclosed a public offering of $750 million in total of 6.75% senior notes due 2034. This offering was increased from the initial $500 million stated. Investors will purchase the notes at 100% of their principal amount. The notes will be jointly issued with their subsidiary, Genesis Energy Finance Corporation.

data.title: Sun PhuQuoc Airways orders up to 40 Boeing 787 Dreamliner jets to boost tourism on Vietnam's largest island.
data.description: A new upscale airline has recently made its first-ever direct jet acquisition to boost tourism and stimulate the economy in Vietnam's largest island. On February 18, 2026, Boeing [NYSE: BA] in collaboration with Sun PhuQuoc Airways revealed that the fresh Vietnam-focused carrier has placed an order for a maximum of 40 787 Dreamliner aircraft. This strategic move aims to enhance connectivity and promote further development in the region.

data.title: Genesis Energy, L.P. raises tender offer for its 7.750% Senior Notes due 2028 to accept all Notes; max amount increased to $490 million.
data.description: Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) revealed an update on their cash tender offer for their 7.750% Senior Notes due 2028. Originally set at $490 million, the maximum aggregate principal amount of Notes accepted for purchase in the Tender Offer has been increased to encompass all of the Notes. The offer, dated February 18, 2026, now allows for the acquisition of any and all Notes, hence removing any previous limitations.

data.title: ElevenEs completes 1st closing of Series B backed by Caterpillar Venture Capital Inc. To build 1GWh LFP Battery Cell Mega Factory in Feb 2026.
data.description: A groundbreaking ceremony will mark the commencement of the construction of the ElevenEs 1GWh lithium iron phosphate (LFP) battery cell mega factory in Subotica, Serbia, and Luxembourg in February 2026. This facility, with a capacity of 1 gigawatt-hour (GWh), will position the region as a key player in battery production.
